docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF VADIM NEBUCHIN IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT ARBITRATOR (TRANSACTION ID # 60383280) FILED BY RESPONDENT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
OPPOSITION TO PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT ARBITRATOR (TRANSACTION ID # 60383280) FILED BY RESPONDENT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-29-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 60404005) FILED BY RESPONDENT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ETHAN DOUGLAS'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT ARBITRATOR IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES ARE REQUIRED TO ARBITRATE MR. DOUGLAS' UNDERINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM. THE COURT APPOINTS ERIC IVARY AS THE ARBITRATOR. SINCE RESPONDENT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY HAS AGREED TO ARBITRATE AND THE APPOINTMENT OF MR. IVARY AS THE ARBITRATOR, NO USEFUL PURPOSE IS SERVED BY DENYING THE MOTION BASED ON THE PROCEDURAL FAILURES BY MR. DOUGLAS. THOSE PROCEDURE FAILURES ARE WAIVED IN ANY EVENT BY STATE FARM'S RESPONDING TO THE PETITION ON ITS MERITS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR #8189 =302/H

MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-04-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ETHAN DOUGLAS' PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT ARBITRATOR IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED. THE PETITION AND NOTICE OF HEARING WERE NOT TIMELY OR PROPERLY SERVED AND PETITIONER HAS NOT COMPLIED WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF INSURANCE CODE 11580.2. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing And Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Appoint Arbitrator
Off Calendar May-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioner Ethan Douglas's petition to compel arbitration and to appoint arbitrator is granted. The parties are required to arbitrate Mr. Douglas' underinsured motorist claim. The court appoints Eric Ivary as the arbitrator. Since respondent State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company has agreed to arbitrate and the appointment of Mr. Ivary as the arbitrator, no useful purpose is served by denying the motion based on the procedural failures by Mr. Douglas. Those procedure failures are waived in any event by State Farm's responding to the petition on its merits. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

Notice Of Hearing And Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Appoint Arbitrator
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ETHAN DOUGLAS' Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Appoint Arbitrator is denied without prejudice to being refiled. The petition and notice of hearing were not timely or properly served and petitioner has not complied with the requirements of Insurance Code 11580.2. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
